title: Gigaton Mace
description: Heavy sounds to really emphasize the power of the mace's smash attacks
body:
Have you ever felt that the mace's smash attack sounds just a bit too quiet? Like as if it doesn't have much force behind it, and that the mace feels too rigid. Well, I thought that too, and since I wanted to make resource packs, I decided to start with this.

---

So, about the pack, I tried to make the sounds have a lot more weight behind them, as if the impact of the mace is so powerful that it sends shockwaves into the air itself.

If that sounds like the kind of thing you would like, then give the showcase video a try and see if you like the sounds I came up with.

---

There are a few things to note about the pack:


<details>
<summary>Notable Things (Please Read)</summary>

The pack replaces all of the mace's smash attack sounds only. This means that non-smash attacks will not have different sounds, just like in vanilla minecraft.

---
Normally the mace's smash attack sounds are impossible to hear independently without the playsound command, because of a (probably a bug) that makes the critical hit sound also play when a smash attack happens

---
I don't have much sound design experience, so I ended up just using the features in the /playsound command to (somewhat) achieve the effect I wanted.

---
Please give suggestions and feedback to my YouTube channel (out of a lack of options, since I don't have any other platform to do this with). Here's the link: [Cauleaf's YT Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@CauleafMark3)

</details>



---

Here's a showcase of the mace sounds (disclaimer, the sounds feel a bit odd when playing them directly, but from my testing they sound fine in game):
